/usr/bin/c++ -Wall  -Wsuggest-override -Werror=vla -pthread -Wshadow -O3 -DNDEBUG -s -rdynamic CMakeFiles/dxf2idf.dir/dxf2idfmain.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dxf2idf.dir/dxf2idf.cpp.o -o dxf2idf   -L/opt/kicad/program/V5/Tears_V5_S/build/lib_dxf  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/kicad/program/V5/Tears_V5_S/build/lib_dxf: ../../dxflib_qcad/liblib_dxf.a libidf3.a -pthread -lwx_gtk3u_gl-3.2 -lwx_gtk3u_aui-3.2 -lwx_gtk3u_html-3.2 -lwx_gtk3u_core-3.2 -lwx_baseu_net-3.2 -lwx_baseu-3.2 -lwx_baseu_xml-3.2 -lwx_gtk3u_stc-3.2
